Experimental capability extensions extensions Implementation-specific extension capabilities format String format constraint framework Framework value hasMore Indicates whether there are additional completion options hints Optional hints to use for model selection host Host value humidity Humidity percentage value icons Optional set of sized icons that the client can display in a user interface id Uniquely identifying ID for a JSON-RPC request idempotentHint If true, calling repeatedly with same arguments has no additional effect includeContext A request to include context from one or more MCP servers input The arguments to pass to the tool inputSchema A JSON Schema object defining the expected parameters for the tool instructions Instructions describing how to use the server and its version string language Programming language value lastModified The moment the resource was last modified, as an ISO 8601 formatted string lastUpdatedAt ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was last updated level The severity of a log message listChanged Whether notifications for list changes are supported location Location value logger An optional name of the logger issuing this message maximum number of items minLength Minimum length constraint mode The elicitation mode model The name of the model that generated the message modelPreferences Model preferences for sampling name Intended for payload pollInterval Suggested polling interval in milliseconds port Port value priority How important this data is for operating the server progress The progress thus far progressToken The progress token which was given in the initial request, used to associate ... prompts The list of prompts properties JSON Schema properties map protocolVersion The version of the Model Context Protocol readOnlyHint If true, the tool does not modify its environment reason An optional string describing the reason ref A prompt or resource template reference requestedSchema A restricted subset of JSON required property list resource The embedded resource contents (text or blob) resources The list of resources resourceTemplates The list of resource templates result JSON-RPC successful result payload implementation size The size of the raw resource content, in bytes sizes Optional array of strings specifying sizes (WxH format or "any") speedPriority How much to prioritize sampling speed when selecting a model (0-1) src A standard URI pointing to an icon resource status Current task state statusMessage Optional human-readable message describing the current task state stopReason The reason why sampling stopped, if known stopSequences Stop sequences for sampling structuredContent An optional JSON object representing structured result of the tool call subscribe Whether subscribing to resource updates is supported systemPrompt An optional system prompt the server wants to use for sampling task Task data taskId The task identifier tasks The list of tasks taskSupport Whether this tool supports task-augmented execution temperature Sampling temperature text Text content theme Optional theme specifier for the icon title Intended for UI and end-user contexts — optimized to be human-readable and ea... toolChoice Controls how the model uses tools tools The list of tools toolUseId The ID of the tool use this result corresponds to total Total number of items to process (or total progress required), if known ttl Actual retention duration from creation in milliseconds, null for unlimited type Type discriminator field uri A resource URI uriTemplate A URI template (RFC 6570) for constructing resource URIs url The URL that the user should navigate to value A value string values An array of completion values version The version of this implementation websiteUrl An docs.title: Notes

or file that the server can operate on no CreateMessageResult The result returned by the client for a sampling/createMessage request no ImageContent An image provided to or from an LLM no TextContent Text provided to or from an LLM no ToolUseContent A request from the assistant to call a tool no ResourceLink A resource that the server is capable of reading, included in a prompt or too... no EmbeddedResource The contents of a resource, embedded into a prompt or tool call result no Prompt A prompt or prompt template that the server offers no Tool Definition for a tool the client can call no ElicitResult The result returned by the client for an elicitation/create request no CreateTaskResult The result returned for a task-augmented request no ResourceTemplate A template description for notification no ReadResourceResult The result returned by the server for a resources/read request no ListResourcesResult The result returned by the server for a resources/list request no HasMeta Mixin for types that carry a _meta field no GetTaskPayloadResult The result returned for a tasks/result request no ToolResultContent The result of a tool use, provided by the user back to the assistant no docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SetLevelRequest A request from the client to the server, to enable or adjust logging no ListResourcesRequest Sent from the client to request a list of resources the server has no ElicitRequest A request from the server to elicit additional information from the user via ... no GetTaskResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/get request no ListTasksRequest A request to retrieve a list of tasks no URLElicitationRequiredError A response indicating that additional information is required via URL elicita... no ListToolsRequest Sent from the client to request a list of tools the server has no JSONRPCRequest A request that expects a response yes CancelTaskRequest A request to cancel a task no ReadResourceRequest Sent from the client to the server, to read a specific resource URI no SetLevelResultResponse A successful response from the server for a logging/setLevel request no ListTasksResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/list request no CreateTaskResultResponse A successful response for a task-augmented request no ElicitResultResponse A successful response from the client for an elicitation/create request no ListPromptsRequest Sent from the client to request a list of prompts and prompt templates no ToolUseContent A request from the assistant to call a tool yes ListRootsRequest Sent from the server to request a list of root URIs from the client no GetPromptResultResponse A successful response from the server for a prompts/get request no JSONRPCErrorResponse A response to a request that indicates an error occurred yes JSONRPCResultResponse A successful (non-error) response to a request yes ListRootsResultResponse A successful response from the client for a roots/list request no CompleteRequest A request from the client to the server, to ask for completion options no PingResultResponse A successful response for a ping request no CompleteResultResponse A successful response from the server for a completion/complete request no GetPromptRequest Used by the client to get a prompt provided by the server no GetTaskPayloadRequest A request to retrieve the result of a completed task no InitializeRequest Request sent from the client to the server when it first connects, asking it ... no ReadResourceResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/read request no CancelTaskResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/cancel request no PingRequest A ping, issued by either the server or the client, to check that the other pa... no InitializeResultResponse A successful response from the server for an initialize request no ListResourceTemplatesRequest Sent from the client to request a list of resource templates the server has no ListResourcesResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/list request no CreateMessageResultResponse A successful response from the client for a sampling/createMessage request no CallToolResultResponse A successful response from the server for a tools/call request no SubscribeRequest Sent from the client to request resource update notifications no ListPromptsResultResponse A successful response from the server for a prompts/list request no CallToolRequest Used by the client to invoke a tool provided by the server no GetTaskPayloadResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/result request no GetTaskRequest A request to retrieve the state of a task no CreateMessageRequest A request from the server to sample an LLM via the client no SubscribeResultResponse A successful response for a resources/subscribe request no UnsubscribeRequest Sent from the client to cancel resource update notifications no ListResourceTemplatesResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/templates/list request no UnsubscribeResultResponse A successful response for a resources/unsubscribe request no ListToolsResultResponse A successful response from the server for a tools/list request no

that a resource has changed and may need to be read again no JSONRPCErrorResponse A response to a request that indicates an error occurred yes RootsListChangedNotification Notification from the client that the list of roots has changed no JSONRPCResultResponse A successful (non-error) response to a request yes ListRootsResultResponse A successful response from the client for a roots/list request no TaskStatusNotification Notification that a task's status has changed no CompleteRequest A request from the client to the server, to ask for completion options no PingResultResponse A successful response for a ping request no InitializedNotification Notification sent from the client to the server after initialization has fini... no CompleteResultResponse A successful response from the server for a completion/complete request no GetPromptRequest Used by the client to get a prompt provided by the server no GetTaskPayloadRequest A request to retrieve the result of a completed task no InitializeRequest Request sent from the client to the server when it first connects, asking it ... no ReadResourceResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/read request no CancelTaskResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/cancel request no PingRequest A ping, issued by either the server or the client, to check that the other pa... no InitializeResultResponse A successful response from the server for an initialize request no ListResourceTemplatesRequest Sent from the client to request a list of resource templates the server has no JSONRPCNotification A notification which does not expect a response yes ListResourcesResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/list request no CreateMessageResultResponse A successful response from the client for a sampling/createMessage request no CallToolResultResponse A successful response from the server for a tools/call request no SubscribeRequest Sent from the client to request resource update notifications no ListPromptsResultResponse A successful response from the server for a prompts/list request no ResourceListChangedNotification Notification that the list of resources the server can read from has changed no CallToolRequest Used by the client to invoke a tool provided by the server no GetTaskPayloadResultResponse A successful response for a tasks/result request no GetTaskRequest A request to retrieve the state of a task no CreateMessageRequest A request from the server to sample an LLM via the client no SubscribeResultResponse A successful response for a resources/subscribe request no UnsubscribeRequest Sent from the client to cancel resource update notifications no ListResourceTemplatesResultResponse A successful response from the server for a resources/templates/list request no UnsubscribeResultResponse A successful response for a resources/unsubscribe request no ElicitationCompleteNotification Notification from the server that an out-of-band elicitation request complete... no ListToolsResultResponse A successful response from the server for a tools/list request no
